ml-medgemma-finetuning-00001.name: MedGemma 27B QLoRA Fine-tuning
ml-medgemma-finetuning-00001.description: WHEN synthetic training data is available, THE system SHALL fine-tune MedGemma 27B for literacy profiling using QLoRA on RunPod 2x A40 96GB SO THAT specialized literacy assessment is achieved
ml-medgemma-finetuning-00001.testable_outcome: Fine-tuned MedGemma model achieves >85% literacy classification accuracy
